PDF p.148 has heading 'References' between BE Example 2 closing (relrec.xpt table) and §6.2.3 CE start. atom_type HEADING correct, verbatim 'References' exact match, heading_level=4 correct, parent §6.2.2 correct per TOC rule (BE last bit → §6.2.2). HOWEVER sibling_index=null is incomplete: per R15 cross-batch continuity, References should be L4 sib=5 under §6.2.2 (after Description/Overview=1, Specification=2, Assumptions=3, Examples=4). The TOC ground truth provided in audit prompt only enumerates BE sub-headings up to Examples=4, but References as 5th L4 sibling sub-section under BE is required for R15 sibling continuity downstream.

PDF p.149 CE-Specification table CESTRF row matches verbatim: 'CESTRF|Start Relative to Reference Period|Char|(STNREF)|Timing|Describes the start of the observation as being before or after the reference time point and a discrete starting point and a discrete ending point (represented by RFSTDTC and RFENDTC in Demographics). PDF p.150 footnote text matches verbatim semantic content: 'In this column, an asterisk (*) indicates that the variable may be subject to controlled terminology. CDISC/NCI codelist values are enclosed in parentheses.' atom_type SENTENCE correct (it's a footnote sentence). parent §6.2.3 correct.
